title: New Craft
description: New Craft is a mod pack that completely modifies minecraft with the help of many mods such as supplementaries, Ad astra, Better end and nether, etc...
body:
**"New Craft" is an ambitious Minecraft mod pack, which aims to offer a complete new gaming experience by incorporating a diverse selection of mods. Such as "Supplementaries", "Ad Astra", "Better End" and "Better Nether", bring new content, mechanics and visuals to the Minecraft universe, offering players an enriched and enhanced adventure.**

### Main features of the "New Craft" Mod Pack :

**Extras :** This mod introduces a range of additional content, including decorative blocks, aesthetic enhancements and various quality-of-life additions, to improve the overall gameplay experience.

**Enhanced graphics :** "New Craft" includes graphical enhancement mods that improve the game's graphics, introducing higher-resolution textures, shader effects and dynamic lighting to create a more impressive and immersive game environment.

**New game mechanics :** Expect innovative game mechanics, such as new crafting recipes, or even automation tools, to add depth and complexity to your Minecraft experience.

**Compatibility and balance :** All included mods work well together, avoiding conflicts and maintaining a balanced gameplay experience.

**Community support :** A discord server is available for "New Craft", where players can share their experiences, report problems and suggest additional mods for future updates.

**"New Craft" is aimed at all Minecraft players, both casual and experienced, offering an exciting mix of creativity, exploration and challenge. It's a fantastic opportunity for Minecraft enthusiasts to immerse themselves in a modded world that offers a new and unique take on the classic game.**
